prompt:
trying to build a matrix that runs our test task across 3 go versions (1.22, 1.23, 1.24) and 2 OSes (linux, darwin), then publishes the resulting test reports as an s3 artifact. concourse keeps barfing on this and i think `across` is the issue but i can't tell what's wrong. current attempt:

```yaml
jobs:
  - name: matrix-test
    plan:
      - across:
          - var: go_v
            values: ["1.22", "1.23", "1.24"]
          - var: os
            values: ["linux", "darwin"]
        do:
          - get: source
            trigger: true
          - task: test
            file: source/ci/test.yml
            vars:
              go: ((.:go_v))
              os: ((.:os))
          - put: test-reports
            params:
              file: source/reports/((.:os))-((.:go_v)).tgz
```

please show me a working version. i want all 6 combos to run in parallel if there are workers available, and i want the s3 publish to actually work.

assertions.name: states across does not work with get/put
assertions.description: Response explicitly states (or quotes) that the `across` step does NOT work with `get` or `put` steps

assertions.name: moves get out of across
assertions.description: Final YAML places `get: source` BEFORE / OUTSIDE the `across` block, not inside

assertions.name: moves put out of across
assertions.description: Final YAML places `put: test-reports` OUTSIDE the `across` block — either as a single put after across, or replaces across entirely with `in_parallel`

assertions.name: mentions outputs do not escape across
assertions.description: Response notes that outputs from steps inside `across` are not available to steps outside (relevant to why per-combo puts don't work)

assertions.name: max_in_flight all
assertions.description: Final YAML includes `max_in_flight: all` (or an explicit integer) to run combos in parallel

assertions.name: preserves trigger semantics
assertions.description: Final pipeline still triggers on new versions of `source` (trigger: true preserved)

assertions.name: matrix coverage
assertions.description: All 6 combinations (3 go × 2 os) are still produced by the corrected pipeline
